code:
import io
import string
import list

fn gcd(_ a: Int, _ b: Int) -> Int
  mut x = a
  mut y = b
  while y != 0
    let r = x % y
    x = y
    y = r
  end
  x
end

let input = io.read_to_end()
let parts = string.split_whitespace(input)
let a_str = parts.get(0).ok_or("missing a")
let b_str = parts.get(1).ok_or("missing b")

match a_str
when Ok(s1)
  match b_str
  when Ok(s2)
    match string.parse_int(s1)
    when Some(a)
      match string.parse_int(s2)
      when Some(b)
        let g = gcd(a, b)
        println("gcd=#{g}")
      when None
        println("gcd=0")
      end
    when None
      println("gcd=0")
    end
  when Err(_)
    println("gcd=0")
  end
when Err(_)
  println("gcd=0")
end
